div.h3: The Inductive Proof of Log Equality

div.p: The consistency check is O(1) — it only checks ONE entry. By induction, that single check proves the ENTIRE prefix matches.

g.text: then logs are identical at index 1.

text.tspan: then logs are identical at index 1.

g.text: Assume: logs identical up to index N.

text.tspan: Assume: logs identical up to index N.
